zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Faxon於1628年5月19日之前出生在英國奧可福爾時，她的父親Thomas Faxon28歲，母親Joane Fawdry24歲。她於1647年9月7日與Anthony Fisher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年10月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆笛卡爾 維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Faxon于1628年5月19日之前出生在英国奧可福爾时，她的父亲Thomas Faxon28岁，母亲Joane Fawdry24岁。她于1647年9月7日与Anthony Fisher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年10月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆笛卡爾 維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Faxon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: Warwickshire dialect variant of Foxon, which is either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Folk (see Foulkes ) or a habitational name from Foxton in Leicestershire.

variants.name: Fawson
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Faxon  .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorials list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Faxon was born before 19 May 1628, in Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Faxon, was 28 and her mother, Joane Fawdry, was 24. She married Anthony Fisher on 7 September 1647, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 16 October 1694, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Faxon est née avant 19 mai 1628, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Faxon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joane Fawdry, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Fisher le 7 septembre 1647, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1694, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Faxon vor 19. Mai 1628 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Faxon 28 und ihre Mutter Joane Fawdry 24. Sie hat am 7. September 1647 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Anthony Fisher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1694 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Faxon è nata il prima del 19 maggio 1628 nel Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Faxon, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joane Fawdry, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Anthony Fisher il 7 settembre 1647, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1694, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Faxonが1628年5月19日以前にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Faxonは28歳，母Joane Fawdryは24歳であった。1647年9月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでAnthony Fisherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年10月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクデドハムオルド ヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Suffolk, M: 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 데드함 드 비라지 세멧리

ko.Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리
ko.Wrentham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 렌섬
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Faxon(이)가 1628년 5월 19일 이전 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Faxon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Fawdry(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1647년 9월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 Anthony Fisher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 10월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 데드함 드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Faxon nasceu antes 19 de maio de 1628, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Faxon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joane Fawdry, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Anthony Fisher em 7 de setembro de 1647, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1694, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Faxon родилась перед 19 май 1628 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Faxon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Fawdry, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Fisher 7 сентября 1647 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 16 октября 1694 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности олд вилладж кеметири, дедхам, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Faxon nació antes de 19 de mayo de 1628, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Faxon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joane Fawdry, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anthony Fisher el 7 de septiembre de 1647, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1694, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Old Village Cemetery, Dedham, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
